entry.title: SAP ERP公有云 [SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] 2408 亮点前瞻
entry.content:
随着全球数字化转型的持续推进，企业资源规划（ERP）解决方案也不断演进，以满足日益复杂的商业需求。我们很高兴地宣布，SAP最新版本的公有云ERP解决方案—— SAP ERP公有云2408，已经准备就绪。这一版本代表着SAP在技术创新和业务优化领域的最新成果，为企业在数字化变革中提供了更智能、更高效和更灵活的工具。Cloud ERP PSCC的负责人Bert Schulze也发布了2408的英文博客：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release的亮点。

2408版本通过一系列创新功能和强化改进，持续提升用户体验并优化业务流程。让我们深入了解一下这次更新中的主要亮点。

本次更新涵盖了SAP Cloud ERP PSCC团队总结的亮点，这些成果将进一步增强SAP ERP公有云的功能性和适用性。以下是本版本的一些关键改进和新增功能的简要概述：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：人工智能与技术创新（AI and Technologies）

人工智能与技术创新在优化业务流程，改进决策支持，提高用户体验方面发挥着关键作用。在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，人工智能和技术创新将带来众多令人期待的亮点功能，用于提升企业运营效率，改变企业应对复杂商业挑战的方式。

本次分享将带来以下内容：

  • SAP Joule in S/4HANA Cloud
  • 用户体验-我的主页
  • 从订单到收款（Order to Cash）的端到端智能流程自动化功能
  • ISLM中全新的一键开启（Turnkey）功能
  • ISLM中支持的新框架-生成式 AI （Generative AI)
  • 情况管理的新用例31N
  • 使用自定义对象创建情况对象
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408中开放Beta功能测试的AI应用（链接）

更多详情可以参考链接

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD)

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中RASD版块更新的内容，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 已使用对象
  • 后继Companion
  • CDS Comparator

更多详情可以参考链接。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，供应链管理板块从库存管理、库存盘点、订单承诺，质量管理从FMEA、缺陷管理、质量通知几大内容进行功能更新，具体可查看Blog：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理。

库存管理 – 管理库存盘点应用

在2408版本中，管理库存盘点应用盘点计数现已支持下载-上载选项，即为盘点计数下载/上载excel，更方便的对盘点计数进行结果录入，且下载的excel会基于盘点凭证中的条目和物料进行对应显示。如使用第三方仓库的客户可以轻松地为其仓库工作人员提供打印输出，完成纸质库存盘点流程后，可将结果以 Excel 文件形式上载回系统，面对盘点计数数据量大的情况可以更方便快捷的进行系统操作。

库存管理 – 库存类型

2408库存管理板块的库存转储应用现支持多种库存类型以及不同的特殊库存类型，详见下方图表，蓝色部分是2408版本库存管理应用新增支持的库存类型和特殊库存类型。

质量管理-高级变式配置和质量管理的集成

在2408版本中，高级变式配置（advanced variant configuration）现已和质量管理板块有集成了，可以按配置激活质量检验。具体为质量检验中的高级变式配置 (AVC) 与检验批次的集成，可将销售订单或采购订单配置中指定的特征传输到检验批次的检验特征，通过简化流程，提高使用 AVC 和质量管理的客户的整体效率。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造

在SAP 公有云2408版本发布之际，制造板块从生产工程、生产计划、生产执行都迎来了一些新的变化，覆盖了可扩展性、用户体验、新功能等重大更新。

监控物料覆盖：

当您对物料运行MRP计划后，系统对于MRP元素有些建议操作，以确保按计划覆盖需求。这些建议是以附加列的形式在“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净细分”和“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净值和单个细分”应用中显示，其中包括重新计划建议的数量。在以往的版本中，该列信息是需要在激活新功能的配置应用中激活后才能显示，从2408版本开始，无需激活即可使用该功能了。

更多精彩内容，请访问制造Blog：

生产工程和生产工序：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产工程... - SAP Community

生产计划：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产计划... - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购管理

2408版本比较大的变动是产品寻源相关的项目范围已弃用，但是也列出了很多新功能。当新版本发布之后，激活相关配置则可以实现采购合同的版本管理。当更改并发布已批准或已拒绝采购合同的版本相关字段时，将自动创建新版本。

您现在还可以通过采购申请项目创建具有自定义凭证类型的采购订单。

更多详细内容可以参考博客SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：销售

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，销售板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • 显示更改日志-销售凭证
  • 批量维护价格条件记录
  • 优化开票凭证打印呈现
  • 基于权限的价格访问-销售合同
  • 灵活行项目决定增强
  • 管理客户退货-版本2
  • 管理贷项/借项凭证请求-版本2增强

显示更改日志-销售凭证

企业销售经理经常需要跟踪和分析各种销售凭证的更改，例如销售报价、销售合同、销售订单和退货订单。过去他必须在各个销售凭证之间切换以访问其更改日志，这既耗时又容易出错，特别是在处理大量凭证时。

2408版本更新后APP：显示更改日志-销售凭证，现在可以在一个地方监控各种销售凭证的更改。该APP为每次更改提供了用户体验友好的描述，使销售经理更容易理解和分析数据。配备了复杂的过滤选项，可以根据合作伙伴功能、条件类型、字段名称和售达方等标准快速地优化搜索。

 

批量维护价格条件记录

由于宏观市场通胀，客户需要根据一定的规律批量调整产品价格。

或者有部分产品价格即将到期，客户需要为其延长有效期。

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：销售话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：财务

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，财务板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • “过账资产重估”应用       
  • 数据修复工具           
  • 含业务交易类型的新自动调整过账场景   
  • 切换到管理日记账分录（新版本）           
  • 管理运营总账科目   
  • 即将发生的从快速启动板中搜索日记账分录的更改
  • 在财务会计里打印客户发票           
  • 成本中心审核手册               
  • 在“管理过账期间”应用中显示变更日志           
  • 删除自动科目确定中的内容           
  • 余额验证中的 QTD 度量    
  • 实际成本的CDS View发布           

！！！过账资产重估”应用 （Post Asset Revaluation）

使用新的“过账资产重估”应用 (F7775)，您可以手动过账重估。新的重估应用使您能够使用重置价值（即与购置和生产成本不同）重估资产。例如，您可以执行重估以将市场价值原则应用于资产会计。新应用将替换之前的应用“过账资产重估” (ABAWL) 。之前的应用已弃用。之前的 ABAWL 应用使用资产交易类型。交易类型确定如何重估资产，例如，891 “上一年度重估（向下）”、897 “当前年度重估（向下）”。在进一步处理期间必须记住这些内容。但是，在新应用中，您可以在过账之前直接指定相应的参数。因此，无法再使用不同的交易类型区分不同的重估。而是使用新的业务交易类型概念。

新应用提供了与“管理固定资产”应用的更好集成：“在管理固定资产”应用中，您可以选择资产并跳转到新的重估应用。重估过账后，您可以导航回“管理固定资产”应用并检查资产值。

新应用在以下业务目录中可用：

业务目录，名称

业务目录，技术名称

“资产会计 - 资产重估”

SAP_FIN_BC_AA_REVAL_PC

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻: 财务话题

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：用户体验

从2408版本开始，空间和页面（Spaces and Pages）将正式成为全新的UI界面展示方式，旧的分组（Group）模式将退出历史舞台。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：用户体验（User Experience）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：技术话题

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：EPPM

管理项目需求-预留物料

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

使用API复制创建项目

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：EPPM话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 当中可拓展性部分的亮点更新内容。将会覆盖以下话题内容：

可拓展性概览，如何为业务需求选择可拓展性？

拓展字段向导，使用开发人员可拓展性更快捷地创建拓展字段

  • 大批量交付，使用一次性交付进行ABAP开发

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性 - SAP Community

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：自动化测试工具

SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中自动化测试工具版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 客制化API测试
  • ABAP Units 仪表盘
  • 其他重要增强

更多详情可以参考链接。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：分析报表

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中分析报表版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 嵌入式 SAC 故事：优化设计体验
  • 自定义分析查询和服务
  • 新审核手册功能：评论、计算、财务业务洞察等

更多详情可以参考链接。

entry.title: Master form fragment not showing on print preview
entry.content:
Configurations in SPRO have been done to define Content form with its corresponding Master form

Both files (content xsd and master form) are in the same folder, i've added the corresponding fragment of the master form as it shows below

I can see the master page locally

Next step was to upload the master form and content form in Manage Form Templates app

But when trying to preview on VF02, only content is being displayed and the master section is blank



Form properties

Master form properties

entry.title: how to scheduled job in hana studio
entry.content:
hi, experts

can anybody tell me how to create scheduled job, my company wants to  this job run at the begin of every day, thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP and Third-Party Cookies Deprecation
entry.content: If Google has decided not to block usage of third party cookies, is it mandatory to migrate to common super domain or the current setup will continue to work with any issue?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Build Service not working
entry.content:
Hi SAP Build Apps Team

SAP Build Apps 

SAP Build Apps - Build Service is not working at all since couple of days, please resolve.

entry.title: Re: How to get a list of Users by License used in the system
entry.content:
Hi Ricardomx, 

   You can go menu system -> Overview -> Tab 'Authorization' -> User  -> Navigate through different section， you may find that you are looking for.  

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Report-to-Report Interface (RRI) in Data Analyzer SAC
entry.content:
Hi Artur3, 

  I would suggest you to check note 3484564 for the pre-requisite for your BW system. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Trigger point in Rework no show auto yield
entry.content:
I have a trigger point set up for operation 0250 on a specific routing, and it is working properly. Here's the situation:

- Production order quantity: 250
- Yield: 240
- Scrap: 0
- Rework: 10

Upon confirmation of the production order in CO11N, a rework order is generated for rework. However, when I start the confirmation for the first operation with 10 pieces as part of rework, the second operation does not show the quantity as automatic (the first operation is confirm type by Final confirmation).

Could you please guide me on how to solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: We required Query Report from SAP b1 Inventory Openin...
entry.content: Thanks Son Tran

entry.title: Re: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Krish,

Just to add on, how about the weight and volume and shipping condition. Are they available.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi i am from USA https://www.myaarpmedicarehealth.com

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - Service binding issue - no data when launching ADT preview for a node
entry.content:
Hi,

If you're reading this, I faced the same issue as you, and it did work after commenting  "sort".

But I was curious why a function like sort would cause any issue. So, I re-checked my code (metadata extension) and found that in Sort I was giving Sort Order by TravelID, whereas the element name is TravelId (lowercase d). with this change I was able to fix the issue and the app is now running with sort. I recommend anyone facing the issue recheck the element names with the CDS fields.

Regards,

N'vn

entry.title: How to split files dynamically in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am now testing "General Splitter" function in integration flow.
The scenario is very simple. We read file from a FTP server, and we do process splitter function, finally we pass the split file to 5 different folders in different FTP servers.

Suppose there's a CSV file with 10 rows being split, and we set up Line Break in the set up of General Splitter as "2", so we expect that there will be 5 files(=10/2) generated as the result of the process.
In this case, how do we assign which split file (there are 5 of them) goes to which FTP server? I suppose we should do the setting in the adapter?

And in the first place, without using Router (which we do not think should be used because we have to set up condition), there is no way for us to connect splitter to end message event and the receiver connected to end message event.
Furthermore, if we do not know how many rows there are in the input CSV file, meaning we do not know how many files will be split as the output, how do we do this kind of dynamical setting for general splitter and receiver adapter?

Thank you in advance.

Shin

entry.title: Re: Career Worksheet Implementation
entry.content:
@sreyadassahu  You are not required to prepare Career worksheet xml from scratch ,you can download them from any sales demo from provisioning ,or you can download them from Learning Hub course files, and then you can configure it as per your requirement .Hope this helps

Thanks

Mridul

Thank you for your time,
Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Timely Time Sheet Alerts for no records on previous working day
entry.content:
@viswapriya - Here is the blog for your requirment

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/bi-weekly-weekly-notifications-for-pending-time-sheet-in-successfactors/ba-p/13776337#M7513

entry.title: How to do AUnit testing for multiple classes with single AUNIT Test class.
entry.content:
Hi All,

My scenario is i need to do Aunit testing for multiple classes with single AUNIT Test class which will be created in SE24. This multiple class are global. Please give me any solution for this scenario..

Thank you.

entry.title: How to implement a Empty Value Check in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hello,

I am now trying to create an integration flow with embedded value check function for mandatory fields, especially for CSV files.
For example, suppose there's an input CSV file as follow, and all three fields(Name, Cost, Category) should always be set as mandatory, meaning there should always be any value other than blank.

------------CSV File Image-----------
Name, Cost, Category
Apple, 80, Fruit
Banana, 50, Fruit
Milk, 40, Grocery
------------CSV File Image-----------

Therefore, if a CSV file as follow was input from the sender, after the process of integration flow, the status of it should show "Failed" because there's blank value (or Null) in the first row, for Category.


++++++++Bad CSV File Input++++++++
Name, Cost, Category
Apple, 80,
Banana, 50, Fruit
Milk, 40, Grocery
++++++++Bad CSV File Input++++++++

To achieve this scenario, I have designed an integration flow as below.

Here's the detail setting in message mapping.

Here's the detail setting for "Set Cost" content modifier.

Here's the detail for Router.

Here's the "Throw Error Message"(Content Modifier).

My thought was that we generate some message saying "Error" which was defined ourselves in message mapping, and the message replace empty values(in this case, the first row, for category). After that, we use Router to check if there's any "Error" values, if yes, then it will be routed to error end event.

However, it still shows error somehow, and I do not feel like it is a smart way to check empty values.
In this SAP learning tutorial[LINK], it mentions that this kind of checking falls into category as expected error handling, but it does not explain the best practice of how we could design in integration flows.

Could anyone please kindly advise on this one? It would be nice to paste a screenshot of integration flow.

 

Thank you.

 

Shin

entry.title: Re: Employee Central - Compensation Promotion integration in Successfactors
entry.content: Hi @WiktoriaD You must have the Compensation module. All the best

entry.title: Re: Total Comp Publishing
entry.content:
Hi @Rahul_Dixit 

You should be able to do it with this trick:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/managing-exclusions-when-publishing-back-to-employee-central/ba-p/13427048

Basically make a lookup table with the list of UserIDs you want to exclude. (or by country or any other criteria). Assign an event reason that doesn't exist to them.

I believe it will skip the Merit publish back but still publish the Bonus part.

 

Kindly let me know your findings.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: A Natural Choice: SAP AIF can now expose events to Advanced Event Mesh to power your EDA
entry.content: are custom endpoints other than AEM planned/possible for AIF events?

entry.title: Re: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Czerwiec/Lipiec
entry.content: Składam formalny wniosek o zamontowanie dużego znaku rozpoznawczego 😛 może dzięki temu uda mi się nie szukać Was przez godzinę 😄

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite
entry.content:
As organizations navigate through the complexities that hinder them from transforming their business processes, it is key to understand that a holistic business process transformation has to include 3 key components:

  • technology or solutions,
  • methodology
  • content and best practices

Here's where SAP Signavio can be a game changer. From offering a complete suite to support business transformation (SAP Signavio Transformation Suite), providing transformation methodology, and also providing a collection of ready to use value accelerators that will guide organizations along the transformation journey. 

SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite is an end-to-end process management solution that gives companies the ability  to understand, improve, and transform all their business processes – fast and at scale. 

Here's a quick watch that can help you to understand how SAP Signavio supports business process transformations.

entry.title: Re: SAP not open after up gradation from 2402 to 250
entry.content: Reminder

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Rising with SAP and the Three Lines (of Defense) Model
entry.content:
I’ve already described in a recent GRC Tuesdays blog post the RISE with SAP program and how Governance, Risk, and Compliance & Security augments it, so I won’t go over this again. But I have good news to share today: if relevance of GRC within this SAP initiative wasn’t clear enough, it has been made even more prominent with the announcement in April of a GRC package for RISE with SAP: The three lines of defense package

 

What is it?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for financial three lines of defense is an existing offering that has now been included in the RISE program to help SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition customers shift to remote, continuous, and risk-adjusted management to drive down risk and compliance costs while building trust.

By embedding the integrated solutions for three lines model into the very foundation of their SAP software landscape, organizations can automate tasks and decision-making, gain real-time visibility on their compliance status, and equip their people to anticipate and respond to the risks standing in the way of achieving business objectives.

 

Why is SAP doing this?

 

Well, quite simply because more and more organizations are requesting commercially packaged solutions to help them address the following trends:

 

30%

 

increase in cost of compliance expected by companies

90% of compliance leaders expect evolving business, regulatory, and customer demands to increase compliance-related operating costs by up to 30%

Find calm in every compliance storm, Accenture, May 2022

75%

of companies to increase risk management spend

3 out of 4 of companies are planning to increase spend across data analytics (75%), process automation (74%), and technology (72%) to support the detection and monitoring of risks

2022 Global Risk Survey, PwC, 2022

50%

of companies to automate controls

50% of organizations aim to automate controls monitoring and management capabilities to address core drivers of GRC strategy in 2023

GRC State of the Market 2023 – Benchmark Research Report, SAP Insider, 2023

38%

of organizations can identify risks before it is too late to take action on them

Executive Leadership: Strategic Risk Management Primer for 2023, Gartner, 2023

 

What’s in the scope?

 

To help companies manage enterprise risks, regulatory compliance, and audit activities efficiently and effectively, SAP S/4HANA Cloud for financial three lines of defense includes the following SAP GRC products:

SAP Process Control

 

 

This internal control and compliance tool enables organizations to achieve compliance and business process performance goals, while keeping their GRC program costs under control.

  • Find problems faster and easier through continuous control monitoring and automated testing
  • Easily adapt and scale with robust functionality and configurable options, increasing user productivity
  • Access a single source of truth with a unified framework and processes, minimizing duplication of efforts
  • Reduce costs using configurable, interactive email-delivered forms for business users, eliminating costly training
  • Improve accountability and problem tracking with workflow-driven evaluations and issue resolution

SAP Risk Management

 

 

This enterprise risk management solution supports companies to scan the horizon for emerging risks and opportunities, and preserve the value of the organization by minimizing unnecessary losses.

  • Define and configure business value drivers and objectives
  • Provide insight into how risks and controls can be optimized to meet strategic objectives
  • Balance acceptable residual risk with the cost of control and compliance
  • Continuously survey and assess emerging risks and opportunities
  • Continuously monitor risk levels, risk drivers, and risk indicators

SAP Audit Management

 


 

The internal audit module helps organizations provide independent assurance of risk and compliance standards to management and audit committees by leveraging real-time audit insights.

  • Improve audit quality, resource management, and scheduling for cost-effective operations
  • Prioritize audits more effectively using technology-driven risk inputs
  • Achieve comprehensive audit insights and standardized approaches across the enterprise
  • Enhance staff efficiency with self-service access to audit data
  • Quickly collect audit evidence using mobile tools and drag-and-drop features

In addition to being a commercial package, these solutions are of course natively interconnected – and also integrated to RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition – so that information can flow from the source system to 1st to the 2nd and 3rd line, and then to Management and Governing Bodies seamlessly:

Benefiting from additional innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, this package enables customers to: ​

  • Establish clear responsibilities and collaboration across all three lines
  • Automate key control and risk management activities
  • Identify and mitigate compliance issues
  • Facilitate audit engagement and improve audit performance
  • Improve business performance and decrease the cost and effort of managing GRC activities with a single-source of truth
  • Integrate with SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, SAP Signavio, etc. to automate continuous control and risk monitoring

 

Looking for more information?

 

If you’d like to read more about this package and its components, then have a look at the following links:

  • Overview video: Integrated Risk and Controls Management for SAP S/4HANA
  • Individual product pages: SAP Process Control, SAP Risk Management and SAP Audit Management

I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard.

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: An eligibility rule for unique solution in SAP SuccessFactors Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @MSTan 

Thanks for sharing this setup (and love the use of the variable)

Another way to build it for this same requirement which wouldn't require to look for the needle in the haystack inside the Variable would be to base the eligibility on an MDF object (non-effective dated) and use import/export to mass update the userIDs. This way whenever the customer wants to make changes they get a CSV with one row per UserID and can easily do V lookups.

Only drawback of this alternate solution is that it takes a bit longer when applying the rule in SuccessFactors (variables are processed very quickly) but it may be a bit easier in case changes are needed and the administrator is not skilled at Excel.

All the best

Xavier

Xavier

entry.title: Re: [CPI-Groovy]: Compare Integer and remove XML node
entry.content:
Something is going wrong when we use the combination in cpi script. 

import groovy.util.XmlSlurper;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
 

I have only tried with groovy ide, it is not able to import groovy.xml.XmlSlurper

If you try this code in you local machine, it works fine. 

import groovy.xml.XmlSlurper
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;

def payload = new XmlSlurper().parse("Records.xml");

payload.Row.findAll {r ->
    r.PID.text() == "M123456"


}.replaceNode {}

println XmlUtil.serialize(payload)

SAP Business One  HANA / SQL

Nikunj Mehta

Regards,

Zhao

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content: Thanks a lot @Jitendra_Kansal   @bill_froelich

entry.title: Re: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 問題請教
entry.content:
您好，
大概需要调用的API和流程是这样的：
Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous)过账生成挂账AR财务凭证
Journal Entry - Post Confirmation (Asynchronous) 获得生成的财务凭证号
凭证1：
Dr Bank
 Cr AR （行项目2）
Operational Journal Entry Item - Read (A2X) 读取需要清账的AR凭证号和行项目号
凭证2
DR AR (行项目1）
 CR tax
 Cr Revenue
 
Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)做两个凭证行项目的清账
<APARItems>
<AccountingDocument>凭证2的凭证号</AccountingDocument>
 <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
</APARItems>
<APARItems>
<AccountingDocument>凭证1的凭证号</AccountingDocument>
 <AccountingDocumentItem>2</AccountingDocumentItem>
</APARItems>
 
您的payload中只有一个凭证号和行项目
所以提示无法清账，余额过大无法自动更正。
 
Regards,
 
Sen

entry.title: Re: Device type SAPWIN + formats are deleted
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks for your comment. Yes, it's deleted. I have copied it from other system.

Thanks with regards,

Vallamuthu M

entry.title: Re: Integration Center chose start entity for Learning jo...
entry.content:
I really haven't found the issues that you are talking about when using Integration Centre to create the following LMS Connectors:

  1. Organisational Hierarchy
  2. Job Code 
  3. SF User

With the SF USER connector being easy to bring in the ID and the Description (See below Integration Specification) for Location (and or other entities as required by my clients).  I 

Field NumberField LabelSF EntitySF FieldDefault ValueAssociationData TypeFormatValue Lookup Table
         
Body Fields        
1STATUSUserStatus (status) statusEdm.String STATUS Lookup Table
2USERIDUserUser ID (userId) userIdEdm.String  
3LASTNAMEUserLast Name (lastName) lastNameEdm.String  
4FIRSTNAMEUserFirst Name (firstName) firstNameEdm.String  
5MI    Edm.String  
6EMAILUserEmail (email) emailEdm.String  
7GENDERPersonal Information (PerPersonal)gender costCenterManagerOfFOCostCenterNav/*/costcenterManagerNav/usersSysIdOfEmployeeDataReplicationElementNav/*/personNav/personalInfoNav/*/genderEdm.String  
8HIREDATEUserHire Date (hireDate) hireDateEdm.DateTimeMM/dd/yyyy 
9TITLEUserJob Title (jobTitle) jobTitleEdm.String  
10JOBCODEUserJob Code (jobCode) jobCodeEdm.String  
11LOCATION_IDLocation (FOLocation)Location ID (externalCode) empInfo/jobInfoNav/*/locationNav/externalCodeEdm.String  
12LOCATION_DESCLocation (FOLocation)Location Name (name) empInfo/jobInfoNav/*/locationNav/nameEdm.String  
13DEPARTMENTJob Information (EmpJob)Department (department) empInfo/jobInfoNav/*/departmentEdm.String  
14DIVISIONJob Information (EmpJob)Division (businessUnit) empInfo/jobInfoNav/*/businessUnitEdm.String  
15MANAGERUserUser ID (userId) manager/userIdEdm.String  
16TIMEZONEUserTime Zone (timeZone) timeZoneEdm.String  
17DEFAULT_LOCALEUserDefault Locale (defaultLocale) defaultLocaleEdm.String  
18DOMAIN_ID  ACME_ALL Edm.String  
19PERSON_ID_EXTERNALUserUser ID (userId) userIdEdm.String  
20PERSON_GUIDBiographical Information (PersonKey)Person UUID (perPersonUuid) personKeyNav/perPersonUuidEdm.String  

I would refer to the IDP document IDP - SuccessFactors Suite Impact of Implementing Employee Central for LMS Customers_V1.41.pdf (sap.com)

And check out the SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Get Your Implementation Right! (Repeat) (you may have to search for where it has moved too) as "Week 3: Leverage Integration Center for Connectors" is awesome for this with videos and tutorials.

I hope that this helps :).

Kind Regards,

Nathan H.

entry.title: Re: Create New Controlling Area in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: I need to add the company code of the country that uses COA separately. Can't I add the controlling area in this case too?

entry.title: Re: DYNP_GET_STEPL not work into User Exit for F4 Search Help
entry.content: So, you are talking about a field in a **Table Control**.

entry.title: Re: DYNP_GET_STEPL not work into User Exit for F4 Search...
entry.content:
For getting the information about F4 on a field in a Table Control, it depends whether you handle F4 via POV  (MODULE ON VALUE-REQUEST or AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON field) or via Search Help (in the Search Help Exit).

For POV, DYNP_GET_STEPL is to be used.

For Search Help Exit, as answered by @rgore at Re: How To transfer values from search help to tab... - SAP Community:

  • Please use the function module F4UT_GET_ENVIRONMENT (It will provide the steploop, where F4 help was triggered)
  • Then use the DYNP_UPDATE_FIELDS function module to update the dynpro field values. Make sure that you have populated the steploop value received from above FM.

entry.title: TRACE SPAD tcode Changes
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Mass update Current Cost from Future Cost for all products

Hello,

Thanks for your question.

Is this what you're looking for?

Henrike

entry.title: Re: How to do AUnit testing for multiple classes with single AUNIT Test class.
entry.content: A Test Class is to test the code specific to each class, so there should be one per class to test. You don't explain precisely the context, so I answer generally. You may create global helper test classes, you may inherit them, you may make a global test class a friend of any class to test, etc.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse

Yes, that was the point (for free) - you'd all worked quite hard on the previous task 😉

And to your Q on the key-as-segment, the answer is yes - see the hyperlink in the main task description and where it takes you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603

entry.title: Deletion Flag for Process Order is not possible due to status ORRQ
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have some process orders for which we are not able to set deletion flag due to order status ORRQ. I've read some SAP Documentations and SAP Notes and it's recommending run t code COPA to store the order records, but when I tried to execute COPA it's showing 'Number of process order stored 0'. I also checked below suggestion based on earlier community discussion but that to are not helpful.

1. Change the status to ORAC from ORRQ, by using t-code COAA or COPA - Not able to execute it.

2. T code BS22 - It's temporary solution. I want permanent solution on it.

3. Can't deactivate Order Record Required tick from COR4.

4. Storage link setup is also checked in OAC3 transaction for object type BUS0001 content server link is also maintained, still we are not able to store the process order through COPA.

Any help on this highly appreciated.

entry.title: No Data Found in Excel Planning View SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have copied a planning area with shared time profile and master data so I don't have to maintain two (basically DEV to QAS). I then activated the new PA and exucuted data integration to upload values in the keyfigure Actuals Qty. The planning objects have been created, I can see the keyfigure values in the master data workbook, but the planning view does not find the data. Of course the UOM conversion is maintained and data is displayed in the original DEV PA as expected. What am I missing? Is there another step I need to perform when copying a planning area?

Thanks for any input!

Regards,
Maike

entry.title: Re: vendor balance transfer from one profit center to another profit center
entry.content: we dont have option to enter profit centre in transaction F-43

entry.title: Applicant Tracking Tool at Status NEW shows the work eligibility as blank unless you click refresh
entry.content:
Hi,

We have noticed that when we have candidates/applicants that are in the status NEW, that the work eligibility is blank.  If we  'refresh' , then the work eligibility 'answer' they provided in their application shows.

Does anyone else have this issue and if so how have you managed without having to Refresh?

entry.title: Re: Integration Center chose start entity for Learning jo...
entry.content:
hey Nathan,

thank you for your reply.

May i ask which entity you started with?

Because in EP you don't have a specific field for ID and a specific field for Description - maybe they are merged in one and you split?

i am asking this because we tend to navigate to the EC entities to get the ID separately from the Desc, and that works perfectly.

as for the SF Connector, we had issues with writing data to JP_desc and JL_desc - since SAP mentioned that is not to be used. Guess you can use the Position connector... but another integration for another thing, when the simple connector does wayyyy better on the other side.

entry.title: Re: Creating tree tables with OData V4 on SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: very nice and useful one

entry.title: Manager View in MSTeams SuccessFactors App
entry.content:
You may be aware that we have published a SuccessFactors App in MSTeams. Please see a video demo of it here.

We are currently at concept/design phase for a brand new Manager View for this App.

Please feel free to submit any ideas you have for a manager view in Teams. Things you would like to see as a manager when accessing SuccessFactors in Teams. e.g

  • As a manager, I want to be able to approve time off with insights about other members’ planned time off during that period (Calendar data)
  • As a manager, I want to be able to see who within my team have the open required learnings, so that I can remind them when necessary
  • Dashboard for Team insights, providing member’s activity such as when a member has achieved a learning, completed a goal/activity, or one member has been overloaded this week (Graph data), or one member has been unskilled since they have added one skill into Growth Portfolio?

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Some great debugging and analysis there, @M-K !

I still can't reproduce what you're seeing, and I've just deployed the same code, i.e.

const cds = require('@sap/cds')

module.exports['northbreeze'] = class NorthbreezeService extends cds.ApplicationService {
    async init() {

        const db = await cds.connect.to('db')
        const { Products } = db.entities

        this.on('countNoAlias', async () => {
            const c = await SELECT
                .one
                .from(Products)
                .columns('count(*)')
            console.log(c)
            return c.count
            })
        this.on('countWithAlias', async () => {
            const c = await SELECT
                .one
                .from(Products)
                .columns('count(*) as count')
            console.log(c)
            return c.count
        })

        return super.init()
    }
}

 and in each case the log output is the same:

   2024-07-30T06:10:56.55+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [odata] - GET /northbreeze/countWithAlias()
   2024-07-30T06:10:56.58+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT { count: 77 }

   2024-07-30T06:11:10.84+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [odata] - GET /northbreeze/countNoAlias()
   2024-07-30T06:11:10.85+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT { count: 77 }

If you could share your entire project directory e.g. on GitHub then I could take a further look. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Build process automation subscription failed in trial account

entry.title: Task 11 - Using implicit parameters with a bound function (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
This is the final task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs". Well done for making it this far! 🎉

Background

In the tasks in this challenge so far you've encountered, amongst other things, actions and functions. But all of those actions and functions you've had to define and write implementations for ... have been unbound, i.e. not bound to a specific instance of an entity. The Capire section Custom Actions and Functions is relevant here. Think of these types of actions and functions as being at the service level (vaguely like static methods in OO).

With that section there's a subsection Bound Actions and Functions which describe actions and functions that can be defined to be in the context of an entity (to continue the vague OO analogy, these are like instance methods).

In this task you'll define a bound function, and (will be encouraged to) use destructuring to determine the implicit binding parameter (this binding parameter can also be modelled explicitly but we won't be doing that as it's far less common).

Defining a bound function

Check the Capire docs to learn how to define a bound function, in CDL. It involves declaring an actions block as a continuation of the entity definition to which you want your function bound. Note that despite the block having the name actions, it is for containing definitions of both bound actions and functions.

Implementing a bound function

Implementing a bound action or function is pretty much the same as implementing an unbound one. The only difference really is that you need to get the value of the binding parameter, i.e. the key that the infrastructure gives your handler to point to the specific instance of the entity in the context of which the bound action or function is being called.

Here's the difference, using the Northbreeze service, served via the OData adapter, at the default path. First, let's remind ourselves of how an unbound function is called, which is like this - note the absence of any entity name or key:

/odata/v4/northbreeze/unboundFunction()

Now, a bound function is called like this - note the function name follows the path of a specific entity:

/odata/v4/northbreeze/Products(42)/boundFunction()

or (using the OData V4 key-as-segment approach) like this:

/odata/v4/northbreeze/Products/42/boundFunction()

The value 42 is the value of the binding parameter that you need to implement such a bound function. Where is that? It's available in the incoming request, specifically in the params property.

In order to retrieve the value, you'll need to grab it from the request object. How you do that is of course up to you, but I'd encourage you to try it in the "normal" way of a dotted path notation from req, for example:

const ID = req.params[0].ProductID

but also using a destructuring assignment in the actual function signature, i.e.

async (<SOME-DESTRUCTURING-ASSIGNMENT-HERE>) => { ... }

Remember also that you'll probably want to re-check the details of the srv.on request, as you'll want to include the Products entity name in that incantation in the optional entity? position:

function srv.on (event, entity?, handler: (
  req  : cds.Request,
  next : function
))

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

Define a bound function called stockValue on the Products entity in your Northbreeze service. This should return an integer value being the value of the bound product's stock, which should be calculated as the product's UnitPrice multiplied by its UnitsInStock. For example, for product Chai:

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Products/$entity",
  "ProductID": 1,
  "ProductName": "Chai",
  "QuantityPerUnit": "10 boxes x 20 bags",
  "UnitPrice": 18,
  "Category_CategoryID": 1,
  "Supplier_SupplierID": 1,
  "UnitsInStock": 39,
  "UnitsOnOrder": 0,
  "ReorderLevel": 10,
  "Discontinued": false
}

the stock value is 702 (18 x 39).

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with this new API endpoint, to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: northbreeze-stockValue.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "northbreeze-stockValue"
}

And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service which contains the API endpoint (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services).

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

If you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Re: Creation of Odata services for beginners
entry.content: Very well Explained...

entry.title: Trial Balance Report Issue in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
 
Our customer is having issue in generating the Trail Balance Report for GL Account. The company transaction is started from the Date: 30-10-2023. However, when customer want to generate the trial balance report for financial year 01-04-2023 to 31-03-2024 they are expecting to get the OB (Opening Balance) column as blank or 0 for all the ledgers, however SAP is showing some values for all the ledgers. Need to resolve the issue.
 
Customer is using: SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.180) FP 2111 (64-bit) [SQL Version]
 
For more information, please find the attached screen grabs.

entry.title: digital manufacturing - Standard Value Key
entry.content:
From the manage routing, there is a Standard Value Key.
I think this data comes from ERP, so I wonder which module in ERP the Standard Value Key is set, which menu it is set from, and how it is set.

entry.title: Task 12 - Give us feedback about this challenge (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This last (bonus) task is a simple but important one. We want to know what you thought of this month's challenge. Reply to this discussion thread and tell us what you liked, what you didn't like, what you learned, whether you found it helpful, enjoyable, or something else! We'd love to know, because only with feedback can we make things better and improve how we help you be successful (after all, that's our mission!).

Thank you in advance for the feedback, and thank you for participating!

entry.title: Re: Implementing All OData Query/URI Options – Part 1
entry.content: Very well explained ...

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP and Third-Party Cookies Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi @Arun023,

as we already mentioned in the update at the very top of this blog post, Google plans to offer the cookie deprecation as a choice to the user. This will likely be framed similar to Safaris "Tracking Protection".

So in theory, if you can tell all your users to turn off "tracking protection", then everything continues as normal. However, many people will want to use the tracking protection. This is why we recommend to continue implementing a solution for your applications so that users can enjoy your application while still browsing the web in a more private manner.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: TRACE SPAD tcode Changes
entry.content: Very difficult. Possibly the change is recorded in a transport request (object R3TR PRIN SAPWIN), or such a transport request was imported. You may try to refine your search by checking who is authorized to maintain this data (S_ADMI_FCD, PADM or SPAA to SPAD) and see who ran SPAD or program RSTXSCRP recently (ST03N). I don't know how you can find out the date when it was deleted (either you know it because the SAPWIN output just stopped working or estimate by checking the dates of existing SAPWIN spool requests via SP01).

entry.title: I want data(dates) for days inbetween transaction date and maturity date.Client Code Transaction Da
Re: Org structure in MM
entry.content: Hi @2831990, here in the process MM is for the purchasing and inventory management, when you are mentioning the project need to be more chontrolled, do you mean from purchasing view or project view?

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Good question (and kudos for working with the dev container)! If for example you're working with the dev container based on the spec in the `.devcontainer/` directory in the qmacro/northbreeze repo then the Dockerfile looks like this:

# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

ARG VARIANT="20"
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/vscode/devcontainers/javascript-node:0-${VARIANT}
ARG CAPVER="latest"

# Install some generally useful tools
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends \
    curl git sqlite3 entr source-highlight

# Install SAP CAP SDK globally
USER node
RUN npm install -g @Sap/cds-dk@$CAPVER

# vi mode everywhere and nicer prompt KTHXBAI
RUN cat <<EOBASHRC >> /home/node/.bashrc
export EDITOR=vi
set -o vi
bind -x '"\C-l": clear'
EOBASHRC

RUN echo 'export PS1=${PS1/\$ /\\\\n$ }' >> /home/node/.bashrc

# Ready!
WORKDIR /home/node

The two relevant lines are:

`ARG CAPVER=latest`

and

`RUN npm install -g @Sap/cds-dk@$CAPVER`

If you rebuild the container "normally" then as nothing has changed, the container layer cache system will be used for efficiency, and you'll get the same container as before.

But you can rebuild without the cache, causing everything to be constructed again.

If you're in VS Code, use the Command Palette to find and run the:

"Dev Containers: Rebuild Container Without Cache"

If you're on the command line, you can use the `--no-cache` option to `docker build`.

Have fun!

entry.title: Re: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conver...
entry.content: Hi, starting the conversion tasklist via the process chain modeler is one way to start. But, a process chain is a collector on its own. It will collect all dependent objects, so also objects might be collected although you don't want to collect in that run. Normally, I recommend to use the "scissors" approach. Start with the virtual objects, e. g. MultiProviders. After this, continue with the source system dependent objects, e. g. datasources. After these steps you work BW internal. It is important to divide the objects in packages with no overlaps. Several teams can work on these packages cross systems.

entry.title: Re: Finding the Header Notes for Purchase Requisition
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Unable to install ADT in Eclipse 2024-03 or 2024-06

Hi,

Have a look at:

SAP Note 3211519 - ODP CDS View extraction authorization information

SAP Note 2855052 - Authorizations required for ODP Data Replication API 2.0

Best Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: [Wednesday 23:00] Sayali MoreClient Code Transaction Date Maturity Date BDB 4/5/24 4/8/24
entry.content: suppose if the days between are greater than 1 than create logic or formula so that transaction date gets in between dates and maturity date should remain same . for eg BDB 4/6/24 4/8/24 BDB 4/7/24 4/8/24 create table this is for one client code

entry.title: What to use as a Template (Pre Populated with Items) to be used for creating Sales Order in SAP B1?
entry.content:
Users have to create large orders from Quotations which contains consolidated quantities. 

i.e. Item A = 1000, Item B = 1000, Item C = 1000.

Sales Order require Groups or segments in it.

Type 1 

Item A = 100, Item B = 100, Item C= 100

Type 2

Item A = 200, Item B = 100, Item C =500

There could be 20 Types. 
thinking the efficient way possible. 

Can we Draft for this approach i.e. Create a Draft of Each type or a draft with all Types..
OR
Should we create another Quotation in required format.

Goal is to create once and use later several times.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Re: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 問題請教
entry.content:
Dear Sen:

感謝回復，您的意思是這樣嗎?

客戶發票會建立一個日記帳分錄:
應收帳款-庫存現金
            餐飲收入
            銷項稅額

等於SA要再建一個:
銀行存款
           應收帳款-庫存現金

然後透過Clearing api兩個日記帳分錄ID(AccountingDocument)互沖

entry.title: Re: Supply Creation-Based Confirmation (SBC) in SAP S/4HANA-aATP
entry.content:
Hi Vasu,

Nice article!!!. 

There is more step without that SBC wont work.  'change planning' should be active in model/version parameters.  Please include this step as mandatory. 

Thanks, Kishor

entry.title: SAP CAP: CDS Action with nullable array parameter
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am implementing a Node.js CAP CDS Service based on an interface definition provided and specified by SAP. The interface definition requires an entity action with following parameter:

  • code: String
  • comment: String
  • reasonCode: String
  • parameters: array of Object with following attributes:
    • code: String
    • value: String

According to that we have specified the action in the cds file:

The metadata is generated as

So far everything is working as expected, but the interface defintion specifies the "parameters" as nullable and provides an example executing the action as:

When performing an action without a "parameters" value the odata v4 logic is raising an error:

Deserialization Error: Parameter 'parameters' is not nullable.

Raised in:

I have not found a way to mark the parameter as nullable. Did I miss something?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Task 12 - Give us feedback about this challenge (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&q
entry.content: Hi DJ, I think it was a nice and well explained series. The main thing I've learned / didn't use before was the `cds repl`. Though this actually came from your friday's series and not directly from this dev challenge 🙂
